entries.notes: Core records metadata, metrics, artifacts, claims, decisions, and debt. It does not execute mechinterp interventions or load model stacks.
entries.title: No execution framework, generic ML tracker, hosted dashboard, or AI reviewer

entries.notes: Canonical project state remains flat files under research/ plus .mechledger/project.json; SQLite/cache files are disposable.
entries.title: Flat-file canonical storage

entries.notes: SELF-GROUND-style claim status, debt, compatibility, and dogfood boundaries are extracted into dependency-light core behavior.
entries.title: Milestone -1 extraction and dogfood

entries.notes: Initialization, scaffold, parsers, Draft Guard, staged checks, hooks, format, and session close surfaces exist.
entries.title: Milestone 0 Draft Guard MVP

entries.notes: Run wrapper, aliases, run-local files, SDK logging, artifact registration, run-ledger proposal, status/next, and disposable indexes are implemented.
entries.title: Milestone 1 Flat-File Run Auditor

entries.notes: ExperimentSpec validation, prerequisite-aware next, claim proposal/review/staleness, reclassification, and debt waiver workflows are present.
entries.title: Milestone 2 Experiment and Claim Workflow

entries.notes: Gate, calibration, telemetry, null, and paired-stat registration surfaces assess registered evidence and produce debt reports.
entries.title: Milestone 3 MechInterp Evidence Assessment

entries.notes: Local session/copilot provenance, open questions, external labels, wording reports, dashboard data, and query surfaces exist without a hosted dashboard.
entries.title: Milestone 4 Assistant and local dashboard-adjacent surfaces

entries.notes: The PRD defers the dashboard server until the core loop proves useful. This repo exports deterministic local JSON instead.
entries.title: Dashboard server

entries.notes: Typed PRD record validators, reproducibility bundles, appendix export, and RO-Crate export are implemented as metadata/export surfaces only.
entries.title: Milestone 5 Long-Term MechInterp Platform metadata

entries.notes: ActivationRecord validates the PRD-required fields, enums, tensor shape, and summary stats but does not compute activations.
entries.title: ActivationRecord typed metadata schema

entries.notes: WeightAnalysisRun is validated; WeightAnalysisRecord remains a documented backwards-compatible alias.
entries.title: WeightAnalysisRun typed metadata schema

entries.notes: CircuitGraph is validated; CircuitGraphRecord remains a documented backwards-compatible alias.
entries.title: CircuitGraph typed metadata schema

entries.notes: CrossModelComparison is validated; CrossModelComparisonRecord remains a documented backwards-compatible alias.
entries.title: CrossModelComparison typed metadata schema

entries.notes: FeatureCorrespondenceRecord, TrainingDynamicsRecord, and RemoteJobMetadataRecord are supported as stricter extension records because the available PRD text does not provide concrete field schemas.
entries.title: Extension optional platform records

entries.notes: Local session/copilot review records are non-authoritative and require human review/provenance before accepted artifacts enter research/.
entries.title: Session and copilot provenance

entries.notes: Local conflict reports, tamper records, explicit redaction, pin/gc, and run bundles exist without remote merge.
entries.title: Sync, integrity, redaction, and lifecycle

entries.notes: Remote sync and merge are outside this local-first implementation; sync commands report drift only.
entries.title: Remote sync and merge

entries.notes: 0431 keeps torch, TransformerLens, SAELens, and other model stacks outside core; tests enforce this.
entries.title: Dependency-light core boundary

entries.notes: 0432 reuses audit/evidence logic but does not revive SELF-GROUND execution code or mechanism-lab abstractions.
entries.title: No SELF-GROUND execution framework revival
